concerns.text: Task T034 implements a permutation test with n=1000 iterations, directly contradicting spec FR-007 which mandates exactly n=100; this changes the statistical power and runtime cost without authorization.

Task T027 implements a multi-class classifier to predict the specific 'Retraction-Only' label, a capability never requested in the spec which only defines binary prediction (Fragile vs Robust) and a citation baseline; this constitutes scope creep and potential circularity violation.

Task T037 implements covariate adjustment as a conditional step ('ONLY IF... inconclusive'), whereas spec FR-012 mandates the system MUST perform this analysis as a required step to control for confounding variables; making a mandatory requirement conditional violates the spec.
